name: Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.3.9

## What's Changed

- Restore installation and updates on Obsidian 1.12.3 and newer.
- Keep the settings tab compatible with both legacy and declarative settings APIs.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/viszkit/obsidian-writing-streak/compare/3.3.8...3.3.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.3.8

## What's Changed

- Count each Han character as one word, so Chinese text matches Obsidian's native word count behavior.
- Apply the same counting rule to live writing progress and Daily Note imports.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/viszkit/obsidian-writing-streak/compare/3.3.7...3.3.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.3.7

## What's Changed

- Made the overachiever glow more subtle in the light-theme sidebar while preserving the existing dark-theme and detailed-view appearance.
- Fixed hovered and keyboard-focused sidebar days stacking beneath the glow from neighboring overachiever cells.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/viszkit/obsidian-writing-streak/compare/3.3.6...3.3.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.3.6

## What's Changed

- Removing a folder from the exclusion list now immediately restores its tracked word-count contribution for the current day.
- Strengthened the overachiever glow so days above 150% of the daily goal remain clearly visible.
- Fixed heatmap tooltip layering so hovered and focused tooltips appear above glowing cells.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/viszkit/obsidian-writing-streak/compare/3.3.5...3.3.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.3.5

## What's Changed

- Heatmap intensity is now anchored to the configured daily word goal instead of the year's highest word count, making colors consistent across days and years.
- Days at or above 150% of the daily goal now receive a brighter overachiever treatment in both the sidebar heatmap and detailed stats view.
- The sidebar heatmap now has a bounded, responsive width so wide histories remain centered and usable.
- Removed the command and integration for importing history from the `obsidian-daily-stats` plugin. Existing imported history is preserved, and importing word counts from daily notes remains available.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/viszkit/obsidian-writing-streak/compare/3.3.4...3.3.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release notes

- Add CI checks using the official `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` recommended rules.
- Run Obsidian guideline lint and release metadata validation before publishing release assets.
- Fix current lint findings around settings callbacks, UI text, metadata typing, and unsupported API patterns.
- Validate version consistency across `manifest.json`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, and `versions.json`.

## Verification

- `npm run lint:obsidian` passed with zero warnings.
- `npm run validate:release` passed.
- `npm test` passed with 91 tests.
- Release workflow built and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release notes

- Fix settings tab compatibility by adding the legacy `PluginSettingTab.display()` renderer.
- Keep the newer declarative settings definitions while allowing older Obsidian builds to open settings normally.

## Verification

- `npm test` passed with 91 tests.
- Release workflow built and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Release notes

- Add guarded local backups for plugin data: `data.backup-1.json`, `data.backup-2.json`, and `data.backup-3.json`.
- Prevent one-day reset sessions from rotating over long-term history backups.
- Restore and merge richer backup history when visible backup data is better than the current `data.json`.
- Document backup behavior and sync-risk mitigation in the README.

## Verification

- `npm test` passed with 91 tests.
- Release workflow built and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fix release scan warnings for inline styles, source-level require(), unbound methods, and deprecated settings display().
- Migrate settings to Obsidian 1.13 declarative settings API.
- Bump minAppVersion to 1.13.0.

## Validation
- npm test
- npm run build
- targeted source scans for .style., require(), and display()

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New in this release

- Added folder filter mode: keep excluding listed folders by default, or switch on Only include listed folders so only files under configured folders count toward daily progress.
- Highlight the currently open daily note in the sidebar heatmap when it matches the configured daily note settings.

## Fixes

- Improved sidebar heatmap refresh behavior so routine updates preserve the existing view instead of rebuilding unnecessarily.

## Verification

- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Use Obsidian locale-aware moment when resolving Daily Notes paths, so localized month and weekday tokens work.
- Show a notice when clicking a heatmap day cannot open a daily note because configuration or the expected note file is missing.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed
- Fixed an issue where moving a note could duplicate today's word count by treating the moved path as a new file.
- Reconciled active editor path changes through the existing rename tracking flow.
- Preserved the original baseline when a move race has already observed the new path with the same latest word count.

## Validation
- npm test: 67 passing tests.
- npm run build completed successfully.

releases.author: viszkit
releases.description:
## Changes
- Refactor plugin data loading, saving, and synced-data reload handling into a dedicated coordinator.
- Extract Daily Stats and daily-note import handling into focused modules.
- Extract status bar rendering while preserving existing plugin behavior.
- Add regression coverage for import behavior and data-sync edge cases.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: viszkit
releases.description: - Open the writing heatmap automatically on first install.

releases.author: viszkit
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add a custom hex colour field for the heatmap setting.
- Show custom colours as active swatches beside the built-in presets.
- Validate and normalize 6-digit hex input before saving.

## Validation
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: viszkit
releases.description:
## Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.1.1

Fixes Obsidian plugin review warnings and refreshes release assets.

### Fixed
- Handles async plugin callbacks with explicit rejection handling.
- Uses activeDocument for popout window compatibility.
- Tightens unsafe JSON parsing and array typing.
- Normalizes CSS margin shorthand.

releases.author: viszkit
releases.description:
## Writing Tracker Heatmap Streaks 3.1.0

First public release.

### Features
- Track daily new words
- Sidebar writing heatmap
- Writing and goal streaks
- Detailed stats modal
- Webhook support for daily goal completion
- Import from obsidian-daily-stats
